name: Is workers comp different from suing my boss for injury?

mainEntity.name: Is workers comp different from suing my boss for injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp is no-fault insurance, not lawsuit—faster, guaranteed if eligible.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers comp is no-fault insurance replacing lawsuit rights; you can't sue employer for negligence but get faster benefits. Key factors: Covers medical/wages without proving fault; third-party suits possible if others involved. Exclusive remedy limits employer liability. Use comp first, explore extras with attorney.

description: Comp is no-fault insurance, not lawsuit—faster, guaranteed if eligible.
